hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】下周，随着七家央行面临通胀测试，比特币的走势可能会变得更加激烈；【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰表示二月份失业增加了进一步降息的理由；【CRYPTO】参议院民主党人推动禁止与战争和死亡相关的预测市场投注。

items.title: Next week could spice things up for bitcoin as seven central banks face an inflation test
items.summary: Seven major central banks, including the Federal Reserve, will issue rate decisions next week just as war-driven oil price spikes raise fresh concerns about global inflation.
items.title_zh: 下周，随着七家央行面临通胀测试，比特币的走势可能会变得更加激烈
items.summary_zh: 包括美联储在内的七家主要央行将于下周发布利率决定，而战争驱动的油价飙升引发了人们对全球通胀的新担忧。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran says job losses in February add to the case for more interest rate cuts
items.summary: Miran said in a CNBC interview that the Fed should be focusing more on supporting the labor market than worrying about inflation.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰表示二月份失业增加了进一步降息的理由
items.summary_zh: 米兰在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，美联储应该更多地关注支持劳动力市场，而不是担心通胀。

items.title: Senate Democrats push ban on prediction market bets tied to war and death
items.summary: Senate Democrats' bill would write the prohibition into federal law even as the CFTC shifts toward a more permissive stance on event contracts.
items.title_zh: 参议院民主党人推动禁止与战争和死亡相关的预测市场投注
items.summary_zh: 尽管美国商品期货交易委员会(CFTC)对活动合同采取了更为宽松的立场，但参议院民主党人的法案仍会将这一禁令写入联邦法律。

items.title: Democrats push ‘Death Bets Act’ to ban prediction markets tied to war and fatalities
items.summary: The bill comes as the CFTC reviews its approach to event-based prediction markets, preparing new guidance to clarify how they should operate.
items.title_zh: 民主党推动“死亡投注法案”，禁止与战争和死亡相关的预测市场
items.summary_zh: 该法案出台之际，美国商品期货交易委员会（CFTC）正在审查其基于事件的预测市场的方法，准备新的指南来阐明它们应该如何运作。

items.title: U.S.-Iran war exposes big market concentration risk. It isn't in S&P 500 stocks
items.summary: Oil prices soar in the U.S.-Iran war, leading to volatility in emerging markets, and showing how concentrated EM funds are in Asian economies.
items.title_zh: 美伊战争暴露了巨大的市场集中风险。它不在标准普尔 500 指数股票中
items.summary_zh: 美伊战争导致油价飙升，导致新兴市场波动，也显示出新兴市场资金在亚洲经济体的集中程度。

items.title: TD Cowen says Congress likely getting closer to permanently banning a Fed CBDC
items.summary: The investment bank says such a move would benefit stablecoin issuers but could also create another obstacle for passing the Clarity Act.
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 表示国会可能越来越接近永久禁止美联储 CBDC
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，此举将使稳定币发行人受益，但也可能为《澄清法案》的通过制造另一个障碍。

items.title: Bitcoin steady above $70,000 as IEA proposes largest-ever oil reserve release
items.summary: The largest cryptocurrency gained 7% from Monday's lows as energy price fears eased, with Asian equities rising 1.8% and Brent crude dropping below $90 for the first time since the war began.
items.title_zh: IEA提议释放有史以来最大规模的石油储备，比特币稳定在70,000美元以上
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格担忧缓解，最大的加密货币从周一低点上涨 7%，亚洲股市上涨 1.8%，布伦特原油自战争开始以来首次跌破 90 美元。

items.title: Bitcoin traders bet on a rally above $80,000
items.summary: Many traders expect bitcoin to recover toward the $80K level between June and September, Derive said.
items.title_zh: 比特币交易员押注反弹至 80,000 美元以上
items.summary_zh: Derive 表示，许多交易员预计比特币将在 6 月至 9 月期间恢复至 8 万美元的水平。

items.title: Ethereum's on fire with record activity, but ether price and blockchain fees lag
items.summary: Capital outflows, even as activity surges across Ethereum’s ecosystem, highlight the growing disconnect between usage growth and ETH’s market performance, a CryptoQuant report shows.
items.title_zh: 以太坊火爆，活动创纪录，但以太币价格和区块链费用滞后
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 的一份报告显示，尽管以太坊生态系统的活动激增，但资本外流凸显了使用增长与 ETH 市场表现之间日益脱节。

items.title: Bitwise CIO reiterates bitcoin price could reach $1 million as he compares it to gold
items.summary: Matt Hougan bitcoin would only need to capture roughly 17% of the global store-of-value market to reach $1 million.
items.title_zh: Bitwise CIO 重申比特币价格可能达到 100 万美元，并将其与黄金进行比较
items.summary_zh: Matt Hougan 比特币只需占据全球价值存储市场约 17% 的份额即可达到 100 万美元。

items.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
items.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production-ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
items.title_zh: Nano Banana 2：将专业功能与闪电般的速度相结合
items.summary_zh: 我们最新的图像生成模型以 Flash 速度提供先进的世界知识、生产就绪的规格、主题一致性等。

items.title: Why China can withstand oil's surge past $100 more easily than other countries
items.summary: The latest Middle East tensions sheds light on how the world's three largest oil consumers have taken different approaches to energy, with global consequences.
items.title_zh: 为什么中国比其他国家更容易承受油价突破100美元的考验
items.summary_zh: 最近的中东紧张局势揭示了世界三大石油消费国如何对能源采取不同的态度，并产生了全球后果。

items.title: China says 'thorough preparations' needed as Trump-Xi meeting hangs in the balance amid Iran war
items.summary: China's top diplomat Wang Yi signaled preparations are underway for a planned meeting between the presidents of the U.S. and China.
items.title_zh: 中国表示，特习会在伊朗战争中悬而未决，需要“彻底准备”
items.summary_zh: 中国最高外交官王毅表示，中美两国元首计划会晤的准备工作正在进行中。

items.title: Oaktree's Howard Marks says there's no systemic problem with private credit
items.summary: Marks said any risk stems from the pace of expansion in direct lending, which has ballooned to a market now exceeding $1 trillion since inception around 2011.
items.title_zh: 橡树资本的霍华德·马克斯表示，私人信贷不存在系统性问题
items.summary_zh: 马克斯表示，任何风险都源于直接贷款的扩张速度，自 2011 年左右开始以来，直接贷款市场规模已激增至超过 1 万亿美元。

items.title: Steve Rosenberg: Russia seeks diplomatic and economic gains from Iran war
items.summary: President Putin pits himself as a potential mediator but that's not an easy sell, writes the BBC's Russia editor.
items.title_zh: 史蒂夫·罗森伯格：俄罗斯从伊朗战争中寻求外交和经济利益
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司俄罗斯编辑写道，普京总统将自己定位为潜在的调解人，但这并不容易接受。

items.title: U.S. Says It Struck 16 Iranian Mine-Laying Vessels Near Oil Route
items.summary: Whether any mines had been laid in the Strait of Hormuz since the war began on Feb. 28 is unclear. The Pentagon said 140 American service members had been wounded, eight severely, in the war.
items.title_zh: 美国称在石油航线附近袭击了16艘伊朗布雷船
items.summary_zh: 自2月28日战争爆发以来，尚不清楚霍尔木兹海峡是否埋有任何水雷。五角大楼表示，140 名美国军人在战争中受伤，其中 8 人重伤。

items.title: Mother of Tumbler Ridge Shooting Victim Sues OpenAI
items.summary: The company banned the shooter’s ChatGPT account but did not alert the authorities, a move that amounted to fatal negligence, the family claims.
items.title_zh: Tumbler Ridge 枪击受害者的母亲起诉 OpenAI
items.summary_zh: 该公司称，该公司禁止了枪手的 ChatGPT 账户，但没有向当局发出警报，此举构成致命疏忽。

items.title: Nasdaq-listed Solmate proposes reverse stock split to build Solana hub in UAE
items.summary: The company also intends to wind down two soccer teams from its sports portfolio to focus on Solana treasury and infrastructure strategy.
items.title_zh: 纳斯达克上市公司 Solmate 提议反向股票分割，以在阿联酋建立 Solana 中心
items.summary_zh: 该公司还打算从其体育投资组合中裁减两支足球队，以专注于 Solana 财务和基础设施战略。

items.title: ABA survey finds consumers support stablecoin yield limits tied to banking risk
items.summary: Consumers agree by a 6-to-1 margin that stablecoin yield laws “should be cautious and not take any steps that could undermine our existing financial system."
items.title_zh: ABA 调查发现消费者支持与银行风险相关的稳定币收益率限制
items.summary_zh: 消费者以 6 比 1 的比例同意稳定币收益率法“应该谨慎，不要采取任何可能破坏我们现有金融体系的措施。”

items.title: Trending Crypto: Internet Computer (ICP)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #54.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：互联网计算机 (ICP)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 54。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Xai (XAI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #688.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Xai (XAI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#688。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #107.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 107。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pi Network (PI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #41.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pi Network (PI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 41。

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
items.title_zh: Balyasny Asset Management 如何构建用于投资的人工智能研究引擎
items.summary_zh: 了解 Balyasny 如何使用 GPT-5.4、严格的模型评估和代理工作流程构建人工智能研究系统，以大规模转变投资分析。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 2 月 18 日星期三 Quantocracy 最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！将日历策略结合到交易组合中 [Quantpedia] 日历策略在以下情况下通常被视为较弱：

items.title: Dogecoin zooms as Elon Musk announces X Money launch date for April
items.summary: The payments app offers 6% yield on balances and peer-to-peer transfers inside X, competing directly with the same demand stablecoin products are targeting. No mention of dogecoin or any crypto functionality was included.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 宣布 X Money 发布日期为 4 月份，狗狗币 (Dogecoin) 大幅上涨
items.summary_zh: 该支付应用程序在 X 内部的余额和点对点转账方面提供 6% 的收益率，与稳定币产品的相同需求直接竞争。没有提及狗狗币或任何加密功能。

items.title: DeFi lending platform Aave sees a rare $27 million liquidations after a price glitch
items.summary: The blockchain data flagged shows a spike in liquidations over the past 24 hours. Some observers believe the event may have been linked to a price update in an risk-oracle system that Aave uses to determine the value of collateral.
items.title_zh: DeFi 借贷平台 Aave 在价格故障后遭遇罕见的 2700 万美元清算
items.summary_zh: 标记的区块链数据显示过去 24 小时内清算量激增。一些观察人士认为，该事件可能与 Aave 用于确定抵押品价值的风险预言系统中的价格更新有关。

items.title: The Daily: Winklevoss twins move $130 million in BTC to Gemini, South Korean prosecutors sell seized bitcoin and more
items.summary: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
items.title_zh: 每日新闻：Winklevoss 双胞胎将 1.3 亿美元的 BTC 转移给 Gemini，韩国检察官出售扣押的比特币等
items.summary_zh: 以下文章改编自 The Block 的时事通讯《The Daily》，该通讯于工作日下午发布。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.title_zh: Codex 安全性：现在处于研究预览阶段
items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good
items.summary: OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard.
items.title_zh: 推理模型很难控制自己的思维链，这很好
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 引入了 CoT-Control，并发现推理模型难以控制其思维链，从而增强了可监控性，作为 AI 安全保障。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.4，这是 OpenAI 最强大、最高效的专业工作前沿模型，具有最先进的编码、计算机使用、工具搜索和 1M 代币上下文。

items.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
items.title_zh: PRX 第 3 部分 — 在 24 小时内训练文本到图像模型！

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在与马萨诸塞州人工智能中心合作，为每个 Baystater 提供免费的谷歌人工智能培训机会。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.title_zh: 通过 Translate 中全新的人工智能驱动的更新，获取更多背景信息并更深入地理解翻译。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译中的新替代方案“理解”和“询问”按钮可帮助您应对自然语言的复杂性。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: Mixing generative AI with physics to create personal items that work in the real world
items.summary: To help generative AI models create durable, real-world accessories and decor, the PhysiOpt system runs physics simulations and makes subtle tweaks to its 3D blueprints.
items.title_zh: 将生成式人工智能与物理学相结合，创造出可在现实世界中使用的个人物品
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助生成式 AI 模型创建耐用、真实的配件和装饰，PhysiOpt 系统运行物理模拟并对其 3D 蓝图进行细微调整。

items.title: AI to help researchers see the bigger picture in cell biology
items.summary: By providing holistic information on a cell, an AI-driven method could help scientists better understand disease mechanisms and plan experiments.
items.title_zh: 人工智能帮助研究人员了解细胞生物学的全局
items.summary_zh: 通过提供细胞的整体信息，人工智能驱动的方法可以帮助科学家更好地了解疾病机制并计划实验。

items.title: Enhancing maritime cybersecurity with technology and policy
items.summary: Strahinja Janjusevic brings an international perspective and US Naval Academy education to his graduate research in the MIT Technology and Policy Program.
items.title_zh: 通过技术和政策加强海上网络安全
items.summary_zh: Strahinja Janjusevic 将国际视野和美国海军学院教育带入他在麻省理工学院技术与政策项目的研究生研究中。

items.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
items.summary: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升可能会消除特朗普“大而美丽的法案”带来的好处
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的估计表明，如果油价长期保持高位，消费者从新税法中得到的损失将与他们从新税法中获得的收益一样多。

items.title: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
items.summary: Roughly 20% of global liquefied natural gas flows through the Strait.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭可能会对另一个能源市场造成比石油更严重的打击
items.summary_zh: 全球大约20%的液化天然气流经该海峡。

items.title: Robinhood's venture fund, which gives investors access to private companies, tanks 11% on first day
items.summary: Robinhood's Venture Fund I plunged 11% in its debut on the New York Stock Exchange on Friday, casting doubt on investors' appetite for riskier investment.
items.title_zh: Robinhood 的风险基金为投资者提供投资私营公司的机会，首日股价下跌 11%
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 的 Venture Fund I 周五在纽约证券交易所首次亮相时暴跌 11%，这让投资者对风险投资的兴趣产生了怀疑。

items.title: Mortgages in 47 seconds: Better’s new ChatGPT app targets lenders Rocket and UWM
items.summary: Creating a mortgage has been one of the most time-consuming corners of American finance, with lenders relying on dozens of steps that can take weeks.
items.title_zh: 47 秒内抵押贷款：Better 的新 ChatGPT 应用程序瞄准贷款机构 Rocket 和 UWM
items.summary_zh: 创建抵押贷款一直是美国金融业最耗时的环节之一，贷方依赖数十个步骤，而这些步骤可能需要数周时间。

items.title: States led by New York sue to block Trump's latest tariffs, calling them an illegal end run around Supreme Court
items.summary: The move from the state AGs — part of the successful effort to block Trump's original tariffs — adds to the ongoing uncertainty created by his tariff policies.
items.title_zh: 以纽约为首的各州提起诉讼，要求阻止特朗普的最新关税，称其为绕过最高法院的非法目的
items.summary_zh: 州总检察长的这一举动是阻止特朗普最初关税的成功努力的一部分，增加了他的关税政策造成的持续不确定性。

items.title: 'I just want to be able to sleep': Attacks in Iran rock cities and cut power
items.summary: Iranians in Tehran and Karaj tell the BBC they are exhausted and struggling to sleep after 10 days of Israeli and US attacks.
items.title_zh: “我只想睡觉”：伊朗的袭击震撼了城市并切断了电力
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰和卡拉吉的伊朗人告诉 BBC，在以色列和美国连续 10 天的袭击之后，他们精疲力竭，难以入睡。

items.title: Jeffrey Epstein had two key aides - why do they still control his money and secrets?
items.summary: Richard Kahn and Darren Indyke administer Epstein’s estate - court filings allege complicity in his crimes.
items.title_zh: 杰弗里·爱泼斯坦有两名重要助手——为什么他们仍然控制着他的金钱和秘密？
items.summary_zh: 理查德·卡恩和达伦·因代克管理着爱泼斯坦的遗产——法庭文件指控他们共谋犯罪。

items.title: At least six dead in Switzerland bus fire
items.summary: Police do not yet know the cause of the fire in the western Fribourg canton, which also injured a number of people.
items.title_zh: 瑞士公交车起火 至少六人死亡
items.summary_zh: 警方尚不清楚弗里堡州西部火灾的原因，火灾还造成多人受伤。

items.title: Woman charged with attempted murder after shooting at Rihanna's home
items.summary: The woman posted about the singer online prior to the attack, the BBC's US news partner CBS reports.
items.title_zh: 女子在蕾哈娜家中开枪后被控谋杀未遂
items.summary_zh: 据英国广播公司美国新闻合作伙伴哥伦比亚广播公司报道，这名女子在袭击发生前在网上发布了有关这位歌手的信息。

items.title: Member of Iranian football delegation granted Australian asylum changes her mind
items.summary: One of the seven women who received visas has reversed her decision after speaking to teammates, minister says
items.title_zh: 获得澳大利亚庇护的伊朗足球代表团成员改变主意
items.summary_zh: 部长表示，获得签证的七名女性之一在与队友交谈后改变了决定

items.title: Arrests, accusations and arguments - the Mugabe family after losing power
items.summary: With Bellarmine Mugabe due in court we look at what has happened to Zimbabwe's ex-first family.
items.title_zh: 逮捕、指控和争论——失去权力后的穆加贝家族
items.summary_zh: 随着贝拉明·穆加贝即将出庭，我们来看看津巴布韦前第一家庭的遭遇。

items.title: Georgia voters to pick replacement for Marjorie Taylor Greene in special election
items.summary: The shadow of Greene, who resigned from Congress after a rift with the president, looms large over a crowded contest.
items.title_zh: 佐治亚州选民将在特别选举中选出马乔里·泰勒·格林的继任者
items.summary_zh: 格林因与总统不和而辞去国会职务，他的阴影笼罩在一场拥挤的竞选中。

items.title: Australian designer Katie Perry wins trademark appeal vs Katy Perry
items.summary: The US singer lost the case in 2023 and later won on appeal, but now judges have ruled against her.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚设计师凯蒂·佩里 (Katie Perry) 赢得与凯蒂·佩里 (Katy Perry) 的商标上诉
items.summary_zh: 这位美国歌手于 2023 年输掉了官司，后来上诉获胜，但现在法官对她做出了败诉。

items.title: Large parts of Dresden evacuated after 250kg WW2 bomb found
items.summary: The city's biggest ever evacuation comes after the British flying bomb was discovered near a collapsed bridge.
items.title_zh: 发现250公斤二战炸弹后德累斯顿大部分地区撤离
items.summary_zh: 在一座倒塌的桥梁附近发现英国飞行炸弹后，该市进行了有史以来最大规模的疏散行动。

items.title: New Supreme Leader Inherits Sprawling, Secretive Office That Dominates Iran
items.summary: His father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, had turned what was traditionally a religious affairs office into a shadowy national security juggernaut.
items.title_zh: 新最高领导人继承了统治伊朗的庞大、秘密的办公室
items.summary_zh: 他的父亲阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊将传统上的宗教事务办公室变成了一个神秘的国家安全机构。

items.title: Civilians Killed by Strikes in Gulf States Are Almost All Migrant Workers
items.summary: Since the American-Israeli attack on Iran began, at least 12 civilians have been killed in oil-rich Gulf countries. All but one of them were foreign nationals.
items.title_zh: 海湾国家罢工造成的平民死亡几乎都是移民工人
items.summary_zh: 自从美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击以来，石油资源丰富的海湾国家至少有12名平民丧生。除一名外，其他人都是外国人。

items.title: Who Is Balendra Shah, the Rapper Set to Be Nepal’s Next Prime Minister?
items.summary: Balendra Shah’s party won a landslide in the election that followed Nepal’s Gen Z revolution. His style is pugnacious.
items.title_zh: 即将成为尼泊尔下一任总理的说唱歌手巴伦德拉·沙阿是谁？
items.summary_zh: 巴伦德拉·沙阿 (Balendra Shah) 的政党在尼泊尔 Z 世代革命之后的选举中以压倒性优势获胜。他的风格是好斗的。

items.title: The Killing Of Haiti’s President Heads to a U.S. Court. What to Know.
items.summary: Four men are accused in South Florida of plotting to kill President Jovenel Moise in 2021. His death plunged Haiti into chaos that continues today.
items.title_zh: 海地总统被杀案已提交美国法院审理。要知道什么。
items.summary_zh: 南佛罗里达州四名男子被指控密谋于 2021 年刺杀总统若弗内尔·莫伊兹。他的死使海地陷入了持续至今的混乱。

items.title: Cost-Cutting Led to South Korean Airport’s Deadly Wall, Report Finds
items.summary: The concrete runway barrier played a key role in a disaster that killed 179 people. An audit revealed officials skimped on construction fees and then falsified records.
items.title_zh: 报告发现，削减成本导致韩国机场出现致命围墙
items.summary_zh: 混凝土跑道护栏在导致 179 人死亡的灾难中发挥了关键作用。审计显示，官员们克扣了建筑费，然后伪造了记录。

items.title: Shooting at U.S. Consulate in Toronto a National Security Incident, Police Say
items.summary: The police are searching for two men who both fired at the building with a single handgun and fled in a white SUV.
items.title_zh: 警方称美国驻多伦多领事馆枪击事件是国家安全事件
items.summary_zh: 警方正在寻找两名男子，他们均用一把手枪向大楼开枪，然后驾驶一辆白色SUV逃跑。

items.title: Fear and Hope for Iranians Trapped Between Bombs and Defiant Rulers
items.summary: Many in Iran feel helpless in the face of their entrenched system, and some are becoming increasingly embittered by the fierce American and Israeli bombardment.
items.title_zh: 被困在炸弹和目中无人的统治者之间的伊朗人的恐惧和希望
items.summary_zh: 面对根深蒂固的制度，许多伊朗人感到无助，而一些人则因美国和以色列的猛烈轰炸而变得越来越愤怒。

items.title: On the Road With Zelensky, Weathered, Weary and Fighting On
items.summary: Ukraine’s leader, Volodymyr Zelensky, traveled east to visit frontline troops trying to stave off Russian attacks, and invited reporters for The New York Times to go with him.
items.title_zh: 与泽连斯基同行，饱经风霜、疲惫不堪、仍在战斗
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰领导人弗拉基米尔·泽伦斯基向东访问了试图抵御俄罗斯袭击的前线部队，并邀请《纽约时报》记者与他同行。

items.title: Coinbase-backed AI payments protocol wants to fix micropayment but demand is just not there yet
items.summary: Agentic commerce holds promise, but data shows that x402 is still in the trial phase

items.summary_zh: 代理商务有希望，但数据显示 x402 仍处于试验阶段

items.title: Ripple to acquire Australian financial services license as APAC payments volume doubles
items.summary: The company plans to obtain the license through the acquisition of BC Payments Australia, expanding its regulated footprint to over 75 licenses worldwide.
items.title_zh: 随着亚太地区支付量翻倍，瑞波币将获得澳大利亚金融服务牌照
items.summary_zh: 该公司计划通过收购 BC Payments Australia 来获得该许可证，从而将其监管范围扩大到全球超过 75 个许可证。

items.title: XRP Ledger transactions jump to 2.7M as price stays rangebound
items.summary: Traders are watching whether support near $1.34 holds after repeated rejection near $1.44.
items.title_zh: 随着价格保持区间波动，XRP Ledger 交易量跃升至 270 万笔
items.summary_zh: 在 1.44 美元附近多次遭到拒绝后，交易员正在关注 1.34 美元附近的支撑位是否能守住。

items.title: Ripple to acquire BC Payments to secure Australian license
items.summary: The license would allow Ripple to offer an end-to-end payments platform in the region, according to the statement.
items.title_zh: Ripple 收购 BC Payments 以获取澳大利亚牌照
items.summary_zh: 声明称，该许可证将允许 Ripple 在该地区提供端到端支付平台。

items.title: Aave suffers oracle glitch, triggering $26 million in unfair wstETH liquidations
items.summary: The issue stemmed from an inconsistency between the snapshot ratio and the snapshot timestamp used for its risk oracle.
items.title_zh: Aave 遭遇预言机故障，引发 2600 万美元的不公平 wstETH 清算
items.summary_zh: 该问题源于快照比率和用于风险预言机的快照时间戳之间的不一致。

items.title: ‘History reveals no evidence’ Congress intended to preempt gambling laws, judge says in Kalshi case
items.summary: An Ohio judge denied Kalshi's motion for an injunction in a case in which the prediction market platform is suing state gaming authorities.
